for n in seg_after['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']

    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} center={center} children={n['children']}")

# Compare node counts
print(f"\nBefore nodes: {len(seg_before['nodes'])}, After nodes: {len(seg_after['nodes'])}")

# Check for disappeared/changed nodes
before_colors = {n['id']: n['color'] for n in seg_before['nodes']}
after_colors = {n['id']: n['color'] for n in seg_after['nodes']}
print(f"Before colors: {before_colors}")
print(f"After colors: {after_colors}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
